summary:
HLA-B27 has high specificity for ankylosing spondylitis due to low prevalence in unaffected populations (~5-6% of carriers develop AS). It remains more specific than non-specific markers like elevated ESR or sacroiliitis findings when evaluating potential diagnoses.

The summary must end exactly at this sentence.
